theme: JPA Relationships, DAO Abstraction and JPQL

sessions.description: Set up unit tests for DAO methods

decisionsMade: Introduced a generalized IDAO interface for CRUD operations
Preferred simple relationships over complex bidirectional mappings
workCompleted: Wrote basic JPQL queries with joins
Created unit tests for DAO layer
challenges: Deciding when to use bidirectional vs unidirectional relationships
solutions: Designed IDAO to reduce duplicated CRUD code
reflection: The DAO abstraction improves structure and reduces duplication. In future refactoring, the IDAO could evolve into an abstract base class to centralize shared logic.
nextSteps: Refactor DAO layer for better reuse
Expand JPQL queries with more complex joins
